titleStmt.title: SII 36.95: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 95. (A.R. No. 95 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: The inscription is incomplete and the last portion is left unergraved. Gift of the village of Vādaṇḍūr, a dēvadāṉa of the temple Tirumāgāḷamuḍaiyār at Ambar, in Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, as kāṇi to Udayamārtāṇḍaṉ and his descendants, by the king at the request of Nuḷambarājaṉ. The grant was made by the king while he was seated in his royal throne Vāṇādhirājaṉ, in the hall Rājēndrachōḻaṉ, the outer western hall of the palace at Muḍikoṇḍachōḻapuram. It was found that the previous kāṇi holder could not cultivate those lands and pay tax dues properly. Therefore the lands were now transferred to a new kāṇi holder.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svastiśrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu muṭi koṇṭa coḻapurattuk koyiliṉuḷḷāl Āṭṭattu veḷi melai maṇṭapam rājentira coḻaṉil vāṇātirājaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Am
par nāṭṭu Ampart tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevatāṉam vātaṇṭurkkaḷāṉa Arintavan Ampar kāṇiyāḷin ṉilainiṉṟu payireṟṟi Iṟai Iṟuttu vārāmaiyil pāḻāy Antarāyak kācuñ cellāteṉṟu Ivvūr muṉpu kāṇi Uṭaiya kāṇi Āḷarait tavira yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu mutal Ampa
ruṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ Utaiyamāttāṇṭ(ā)ṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattārkkuṅ kāṇiyākak kuṭukkavum peṟaveṇṭumeṉṟu nuḷamparājan namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvūr Ivaṉukku Ivaṉ vaṟkattārkkume kāṇiyākak kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku nam
Uḷvariyum Ikkāṇiāḷaṉukkup peṟumpaṭi kūṟaiyum pōkakkāṭṭik kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷa tirumantiraōlai nāyakan brahmamārāyan EḻuttiLeft unengraved.
rupatināl vanta tirumukappaṭiyum puravuvari nāyaka nāṅkoṟṟaṉuṅ kūttaṉūruṭaiyāṉuṅ karuppūruṭaiyāṉuṅ koṭṭuruṭaiyāṉum mukaveṭṭi pūcaṅkuṭaiyāṉum marutaLeft unengraved.
ṟpattiraṇṭāvatu Amparuṭaiyāṉ veḷān Utaiyamāttāṇṭaṉukkuk kāṇiyāka Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu AmLeft unengraved.
Digital edition of SII 36.95 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
